concept.core_loop: tap to jump over neon obstacles and grab glowing orbs for a score-multiplier combo; survive as the world ramps; difficulty starts gentle and steps up every ~8s into a faster color tier, up to a hard speed cap
mechanics: speed tiers that change accent color
concept.art_direction: neon vector on near-black (#080810); cyan (#22e6ff) player square with additive glow halo and squash/stretch on jump+land; magenta (#ff3df0) and yellow (#ffe14d) obstacle bars with glow; gold (#ffd23d) orbs that pulse; layered background with a faint parallax grid plus slower-drifting star dots so there is no dead space; readable large score top-center; juice: white flash + short screen shake on crash, score pulse + small particle burst on orb pickup; accent hue shifts as the speed tier climbs
concept.differentiation_notes: layers an orb-collection combo and visible speed tiers on top of bare survival, with feel (shake/flash/squash) so it reads as an intentional toy rather than a tech demo
